title: helichrysum arenarium
intro: Helichrysum arenarium, also known as rock rose or mountain curry, is a flowering plant species within the sunflower family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The plant is rich in health benefits, including reducing stress, anxiety, and inflammation, as well as supporting respiratory health and promoting wound healing. Helichrysum arenarium can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or essential oil, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
